posts.title: js基础方法
posts.text: js基础方法洗牌算法123456789101112function shuffle(arr) { const shuffled = [...arr]; const len = arr.length; for (let i = len - 1; i > 0; i--) { const j = Math.floor((i + 1) * Math.random()); const temp = shuffled[i]; shuffled[i] = shuffled[j]; shuffled[j] = temp; } return shuffled;} 随机抽取（洗牌算法延伸）12345678910111213141516funciton getRandomArrayElements(arr, count) { const shuffled = [...arr]; const len = arr.length; if (len < count) { count = len; } const min = len - count; for (let i = len - 1; i >= min; i--) { const j = Math.floor((i + 1) * Math.random()); const temp = shuffled[i]; shuffled[i] = shuffled[j]; shuffled[j] = temp; } return shuffled.slice(min);} 节流12345678910111213141516function throttle(func, delay) { let timer = null; let startTime = Date.now(); return function () { const curTime = Date.now(); // 剩余时间 const remaining = delay - (curTime - startTime); // console.log(remaining); const context = this; const args = arguments; if (remaining <= 0) { func.apply(context, args); startTime = Date.now(); } }} 防抖1234567function debounce(func, delay) { let timeout = null; return function() { timeout && clearTimeout(timeout); timeout = setTimeout(func, delay); }}

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
